modules.name: pyshexc.rdflib.contextcache
documentation:
Cache function for rdflib-jsonld

json-ld conversions can often involve hundreds of thousands of JSON objects, each with its own context(s).  It is
horribly inefficient to fetch the context for each go-around.  This function caches contexts.

methods.name: pyshexc.parser_impl.shex_oneofshape_parser.ShexTripleExpressionParser.visitTripleConstraint
documentation: tripleConstraint: senseFlags? predicate inlineShapeExpression cardinality? annotation* semanticAction
def _onShapeExpr(self, ctx: ShExDocParser.OnShapeExprContext) -> TripleConstraint:
""" onShapeExpr : KW_ON (KW_SHAPE KW_EXPRESSION)? inlineShapeExpression """
expr_parser = ShexShapeExpressionParser(self.context)
expr_parser.visit(ctx.inlineShapeExpression())
return expr_parser.expr

methods.name: pyshexc.parser_impl.parser_context.ParserContext.fix_re_escapes

The ShEx RE engine allows escaping any character.  We have to remove that escape for everything except those
that CAN be legitimately escaped

```
param txt

text to be escaped
```

functions.name: pyshexc.parser_impl.generate_shexj.do_parse
documentation:
Parse the jsg in infilename and save the results in outfilename
\:param infilename: name of the file containing the ShExC
\:param jsonfilename: target ShExJ equivalent
\:param rdffilename: target ShExR equivalent
\:param rdffmt: target RDF format
\:param context: @context to use for rdf generation. If None use what is in the file
\:return: true if success

\:param default_base: base URI for relative URI's in schema
\:return: ShExJ Schema object.  None if error.
